name: Paladin Smite Spell Kit — Searing / Thunderous / Wrathful / Branding / Divine Favor
description: A level 5 Oath of Devotion Paladin exercises all five smite-family spells across 5 rounds against two training dummies. Tests (1) `on_next_weapon_hit` rider wiring for Searing/Thunderous/Wrathful/Branding Smite — rider fires on first hit, is consumed, target rolls the rider's save, failure adds the rider's condition; (2) concentration swap between successive concentration smites; (3) Divine Favor as a non-concentration `damage_rolls` bonus that persists across attacks (2024 RAW); (4) spell slot economy (4×L1 + 2×L2). Dice are deterministically scripted via queueDiceRolls: rider bonus dice come first, then target's save d20, then (for Divine Favor) per-attack 1d4 radiant dice.

monsters.comment: Beefy training dummy — tanks 5 rounds of paladin abuse (weapon 8/hit × ~10 attacks + riders).
monsters.name: Target Dummy Alpha

monsters.comment: Secondary dummy — just there to keep encounter non-trivial and verify rider targets the struck creature.
monsters.name: Target Dummy Beta

actions.comment: Start combat — paladin takes a battle stance.

input.text: I ready my sword against the dummies

actions.comment: Paladin rolls 20 → acts first each round.
=== ROUND 1: Searing Smite (concentration, +1d6 fire + CON save → Ignited) ===
Searing Smite is concentration + L1 slot consumed.
Queue R1 rider dice: 1d6 fire = 5, CON save (DC 14) = natural 5 → fail (5 + 0 CON mod < 14) → Ignited.
R1 attack Alpha with Longsword. First hit should consume the Searing Smite rider.

input.text: attack Target Dummy Alpha with Longsword

actions.comment: Attack: 14 + 6 = 20 vs AC 10 → hit. No eligibleEnhancements asserted (rider is implicit, not opt-in).
Weapon damage: 5 + 3 = 8 slashing. Server rolls 1d6 fire rider (5) + resolves CON save (5 → fail, Ignited applied). Runner auto-completes EA chain with natural-1 miss.
Alpha should now be Ignited (failed Searing Smite CON save).
End R1. Expected dmg: weapon 8 + rider 5 fire = 13. Plus start-of-turn Searing tick when Alpha acts (0–6 + save-to-end). HP ≥ 281 after player turn, ≥ 275 after dummy ticks.
Wait for R2 paladin turn — dummies do nothing (no attacks, speed 0).
=== ROUND 2: Thunderous Smite (concentration, +2d6 thunder + STR save → Prone) ===
Casting Thunderous Smite drops Searing Smite concentration (both concentration) and consumes another L1 slot.
Queue R2 rider dice: 2d6 thunder = 3 + 3 = 6, STR save = natural 5 → fail (5 + 0 < 14) → Prone.
R2 attack Alpha — rider fires on first hit.

input.text: attack Target Dummy Alpha with Longsword

actions.comment: Attack: 14 + 6 = 20 → hit.
Weapon 5 + 3 = 8 + rider 6 thunder. Server resolves STR save (5 → fail → Prone). EA auto-completes.
Alpha now Prone (failed Thunderous Smite STR save). Ignited should be gone (Searing concentration dropped).
=== ROUND 3: Wrathful Smite (concentration, +1d6 psychic + WIS save → Frightened) ===
Wrathful Smite replaces Thunderous Smite concentration. L1 slot consumed again.
Queue R3 rider dice: 1d6 psychic = 5, WIS save = natural 5 → fail → Frightened.

input.text: attack Target Dummy Alpha with Longsword

actions.comment: Weapon 8 + rider 5 psychic. Server resolves WIS save (fail → Frightened).
Alpha should have Frightened (from failed WIS save).
=== ROUND 4: Branding Smite (concentration, +2d6 radiant — NO save) ===
Branding Smite replaces Wrathful Smite concentration. Consumes an L2 slot (not L1).
L1 slots unaffected by the L2 cast.
Queue R4 rider dice: 2d6 radiant = 3 + 3 = 6. Branding Smite has no trigger save.

input.text: attack Target Dummy Alpha with Longsword

actions.comment: Weapon 8 + rider 6 radiant = 14 on first hit. No save prompted. EA auto-completes.
Concentration remains Branding Smite (rider consumed, but concentration persists until replaced or dropped).
=== ROUND 5: Divine Favor (NON-concentration in 2024 RAW, +1d4 radiant on every weapon attack for 1 min) ===
Divine Favor is NOT concentration (2024 RAW) — Branding Smite concentration MUST still be active. L1 slot consumed.
Queue R5 damage bonus dice: 2 × 1d4 radiant (one per weapon attack, auto-applied by damage_rolls bonus effect). Values: 2, 2.

input.text: attack Target Dummy Alpha with Longsword

actions.comment: First attack damage: weapon 5 + 3 = 8 + Divine Favor 1d4 (2) = 10. No on-hit rider (DF is a persistent damage_rolls bonus, not on_next_weapon_hit).
Concentration STILL Branding Smite (Divine Favor didn't replace it). Divine Favor should still be active (rounds-based, not consumed by single hit).
